caption:
Most marketing agencies figure it out as they go.

They run different plays for every client, hop between channels when something doesn't work, and rebuild strategy every quarter. Nothing compounds because nothing repeats.

GLV runs every client through the same five-step process. Every time.

One. Research the market. Who's actually searching. What competitors are ranking for. What's converting locally. We do this before we recommend a single tactic.

Two. Build the foundation in the right order. Site speed. On-page SEO. Google Business Profile. Email infrastructure. Tracking. You can't optimise what isn't built.

Three. Execute weekly. Content, links, ads, email, all running on a published cadence. Nothing waits for someone to feel inspired.

Four. Review what's moving. We pull the data every two weeks and route spend toward what's working.

Five. Let it compound. Six months of consistent execution beats six months of pivoting every two weeks.

Comment PROCESS below and I'll DM you the full step-by-step doc we walk every new client through.

Which of these steps do you think most agencies skip?
first_comment: Full process breakdown in the carousel. Comment PROCESS for the step-by-step doc or visit glvmarketing.ca
